subject: Have you seen these?

body:
Friend --

Have you seen these headlines?

_**House challengers build war chests for 2018 . . . **_

_**House Dems outpace GOP by nearly $9 million . . . **_

It's not good news, that's for sure.

While your House Republicans are busy doing the work you elected them to do -- like passing tax reform -- the Democrats are outraising us and building their war chests for 2018.

That's why we're reaching out to you, Friend.

**[As a committed conservative, we're inviting you to become a Team Ryan member and join us in protecting our majority so we can continue to pass your conservative agenda >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzExNDU1ODYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0Mjg1ODc0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

The Democrats may have Hollywood and special interests -- but as long as we have you and your fellow conservatives, we will preserve our majority and continue to pass your agenda. That's why we want you with us.

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Open enrollment
body:
Make sure that everyone knows that quality, affordable care is available. **Holding Donald Trump, his administration, and the rest of the GOP accountable is one of the most important parts of our work.

Become a Factivist today to get the latest information about what they're up to, then forward these emails to your friends and family to keep them in the loop, too.**

**[BECOME A FACTIVIST](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644bf8/4182282741/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Become-a-Factivist?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+BECOME+A+FACTIVIST&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd")**
Derek --

The Trump White House is trying to sabotage Obamacare:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644bf9/4182282741/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd")
**[RETWEET](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b86/4182282741/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+RETWEET&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd") **
They are ignoring the millions of Americans who organized, protested, rallied, and called their representatives to protect the Affordable Care Act:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b87/4182282741/VEsC/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd")
**[RETWEET](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b84/4182282741/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+RETWEET&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd") **
Donald Trump is trying everything he can to make it harder for Americans to get coverage. But it only works if we stay silent:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b85/4182282741/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today3?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd")
**[RETWEET](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b82/4182282741/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today3?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+RETWEET&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd") **
So let's shout this from the rooftops:

Open enrollment to get coverage under the Affordable Care Act for 2018 begins on November 1st and ends December 15th. Mark your calendars and make sure that everyone knows that quality, affordable care is available -- Trump just doesn't want anyone to know about it: [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b83/4182282741/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today4?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd")
**[RETWEET](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b80/4182282741/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/Retweet-This-Today4?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+RETWEET&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd") **
Despite Trump's claim that Obamacare is "dead," he's wrong.

Democrats across the country are still fighting to protect affordable health care for everyone. But we can't do it without your help -- so tweet and share -- your help is critical to getting the word out.

The Democrats

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b81/4182282741/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b8e/4182282741/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b8f/4182282741/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a24/4067b0a/456da7067/7e644b8c/4182282741/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171023_dnc_nd&source=em_20171023_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: Achieving the American Dream
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c2939bcb739dee08b1ac47e6888d9c0c561bc2831558e6f16d32fdc459ce63b817385631b0c3e467669bf3c9709fa2955

Our current uncompetitive corporate tax rate encourages U.S. firms to keep profits offshore. In 2016, a Federal corporate tax rate of 20 percent could have brought more than $140 billion in corporate profits back to America,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c126b1c0e62b8f13c1e5a6e4d5696dd3a032ea9fa1d24c643f1594f69133acbc6b1b31a2b63fc297fb575b2ceddcc3bc2
according to an analysis by the Council of Economic Advisers. Those profits could have helped boost the incomes of U.S. households. President Donald J. Trump is committed to investing in American jobs and the Unified Framework for Fixing Our Broken Tax Code will end the “offshoring model” as companies will bring profits back and invest in American workers.

---------------------

Achieving the American Dream

President Trump issued a Presidential Proclamation designating October 22nd through October 28, 2017 as National Minority Enterprise Development Week. Since our earliest days, hardworking entrepreneurs have driven our Nation's prosperity. During Minority Enterprise Development Week, we recognize the contributions that minority owned businesses make to our economy and our way of life, and we strive to ensure that small business owners have access to the resources they need to achieve the American Dream.

Additionally, the White House is hosting a tax reform town hall today in Bucks County, Pennsylvania, to discuss with hard working Americans how the Administration's tax reform policy prioritizes providing tax relief to middle-income families. Advisor Ivanka Trump and U.S. Treasurer Jovita Carranza will participate.

Read more
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c1a09f5ab3cc8bd4dc71f333c642ab0727f5eaf38cd3fcc0f20db65006b2caf94110fbd5700a01d0e80d2df1debc44632
here.

President Trump to Award the Medal of Honor
This afternoon, President Trump will award the Medal of Honor to United States Army Captain Gary M. Rose (retired) for conspicuous gallantry during the Vietnam War. Captain Rose will receive the Medal of Honor for voluntarily risking his life on multiple occasions during combat operations, while serving as a medic with the 5th Special Forces Group (Airborne).

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c9cc97c22880dcc02f4932510169587e43fac15b9764371b149789f0be38229f6df2192411a9480ad036d3cf7be498c03
Watch the ceremony live at 3pm ET.

First Lady’s Inauguration Gown to Smithsonian Exhibit
On Friday, the gown worn by First Lady Melania Trump to the 2017 inaugural celebrations was added to the First Ladies Collection at the National Museum of American History. The exhibit features 26 dresses worn by former First Ladies, providing visitors with a glimpse of the changing role of the First Lady over the past 200 years.

“Today is such an honor as I dedicate my inaugural couture piece to the First Ladies exhibit at the National Museum of American History,” the First Lady said. “In addition to celebrating fashion, which is something I have loved since I was a small child, there is no better way to memorialize such a special evening, and new chapter in the life of our family.”

Read more about the event
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c7cccd1330c997579084bf3d00e40c06961800f4098c6b1335d32f73448806cc8436db4ff73ce15118af7ed40427fe6ca
here.

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump at the presentation of her inaugural gown at the Smithsonian National Museum of American History | October 20, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will welcome Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong of Singapore to the White House. After a working lunch, they will give joint statements from the Rose Garden at 1:30pm –
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6ce9fda86cbbebe9cf63c6a8e6ac55dd158c353cb6d5bcdd9355868d857317d2dc06c2562b1c720784f8287a19d74b4975
Watch Live. In the afternoon, the President will award the Medal of Honor to United States Army Captain Gary M. Rose.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c68970e53fa87c4e6977c0b4f502a6d202f1d98a17c74caa0878f4e7b65ef9cd708518719807fb971735877109c34c891
Watch live at 3pm ET.

Vice President Mike Pence will deliver remarks at the Marine Barracks in Washington, D.C., to commemorate the anniversary of the 1983 bombing of the Marine barracks in Beirut, Lebanon.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6cb62ff4fb9c1ff45faa53cb85bde79fbfbd5016acdc43c653117b8bc651fd25c86834c0fb535f654d784295ccad90eb16
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be6fbdaf76f72f6c66b4dc5e51ef70281d45ced17569f515b31d428bbb729af5cb0c8ddd15d0a58cd8f6d7a3f6021b38bdd367b65a774448
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44d18a92b448117e675a2bb056eb2eb4974121585384d07a98a712427b2fcd2513ee170e94c8349295b2540b70db06af7
Unsubscribe

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: It's time to impeach [Sign On]
body:
Dear Activist,
When our founders designed the articles of impeachment, they did so with someone just like Donald Trump in mind - a dangerous demagogue who maintains his hold on power by dividing our nation and poisoning our democracy.

A Republican Congress once impeached a president for far less, and today, people in Congress and his own administration know that this president is a clear and present danger yet refuse to act. To stop our reckless and dangerous president, we must raise our voices together. So I've set a goal of gathering one million signatures demanding Congress take action and impeach Trump.

**[Will you join me in calling on Congress for Trump's immediate impeachment?](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/e0dyo/6/Wy/r5cs/6RjfqS/62JuhMLLor/P)**
[](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/e0dyo/s/W2/r5cs/6RjfqS/vKbb18qJf1/P)
Donald Trump's list of impeachable offenses grows by the day. He's taken money from foreign governments, obstructed justice at the FBI, and even brought us to the brink of nuclear war.

If that's not a case for impeachment, then I don't know what is.

He's out of control, but members of Congress have shown they won't take meaningful action without some serious pressure from their constituents. That's where we come in.

Like you, I'm a citizen who know it's up to us to do something. If enough concerned American voters speak up, our lawmakers will have no choice but to remove Trump from office.

**[Please, help us reach one million signatures demanding impeachment by adding your name to our petition today.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/e0dyo/v/Wy/r5cs/6RjfqS/vP5FqrdVjb/P)**

The time for wishful thinking is over. It's up to us.

Tom Steyer

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjA3LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTUzMDYyNDIy)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Like you, I'm a citizen who know it's up to us to do something. If enough concerned American voters speak up, our lawmakers will have no choice but to remove Trump from office. The time for wishful thinking is over. It's up to us. Tom Steyer If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

subject: No more self-serving Republicans in Washington, Derek
body:
This budget shows us what Republicans value.
---
**The GOP's new budget leaves hardworking American families behind. Pitch in $10 or more to help elect Democrats who will fight for all of us.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a39/4067b0a/456b8c6fc/7e642188/501282/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171023_joc_v3s2&source=em_20171023_joc_v3s2&refcode=em_20171023_joc_v3s2")**

Derek --

Right now, Washington, D.C. is short on leaders who are here to serve others instead of themselves.

Take the GOP's latest tax scheme.

Trump and congressional Republicans want to eliminate the federal state and local tax (SALT) deduction -- which helped over 44 million Americans in 2015 alone.

Simultaneously, the GOP wants to cut taxes for corporations and the wealthy. They'd eliminate the estate tax, which would only benefit families like the Trumps and fewer than 100 businesses. And to pay for it, they're working to pass a budget that guts Medicaid and Medicare, education, and more.

We can't let Trump and the multimillionaires in his cabinet manipulate our tax code for their own benefit. Pitch in $10 or more now to help elect Democrats who will work for every American.

body:

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I refuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Do you want to know the sad thing about Washington these days? We can't have a civilized debate anymore. You can't argue with ideologues like Speaker Paul Ryan. They simply don't care that repealing the Affordable Care Act would leave millions of people uninsured. They don't care if their actions drive up premiums or reduce access to critical preventative health care services. To them, repealing or sabotaging the Affordable Care Act is about one thing: Politics. They want to get rid of President Obama's crowning achievement. What happens afterward is irrelevant. Their plan is working. Thanks to sabotage and uncertainty caused by President Trump and Republicans in Congress, our health care markets are destabilizing. And instead of working to fix the problems, they do nothing -- just to see the markets collapse. **Well, I refuse.** I refuse to let 23 million Americans lose insurance. I refuse to go back to the days when insurance companies ruled our health care system. I refuse to return to a time when people like me, with pre-existing conditions, couldn't find affordable care. **If I have to spend every single day of this ridiculous Administration fighting to preserve access to affordable health care, that is what I will do.** No family in Florida should lose coverage or be put at risk because Speaker Ryan and President Trump can't see past their own politics. [_**I need you with me, every step of the way. To keep this network going strong, we need to reach $15,000 by the end of the month. Last I checked, we were still a bit short. So please, if you can, stand with me by giving $5, $10, or more.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1b/622b7b5b/6d5e0b0/307bd05a/2370007261/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171023z?refcode=dwse171023z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") You can count on me to keep fighting for your health care. Thank you for fighting beside me. Debbie | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1b/622b7b5b/6d5e0b0/307bd05a/2370007261/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171023z?refcode=dwse171023z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: ④ new endorsements for an office with a big impact on elections
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c635e/24c69fd9/818f2877/189c4a8a/2616097604/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact&source=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact")
---

Peter,

You probably know about our national secretary of state, but did you know many states elect their own secretaries of state? And that they have a HUGE impact on our elections?

Secretaries of state are usually responsible for making sure elections are fair and transparent, coordinating the ballots for statewide elections, and processing your voter registration.

It's a tall order, but all this and more are part of the job.

Because secretaries of state have far-reaching effects on our democracy, we're endorsing four strong progressive champions running for this office:**Kathleen Clyde (OH), Nellie Gorbea (RI), Jena Griswold (CO),** and **Maggie Toulouse Oliver (NM).**

**[Donate $3 to help elect these four women running for secretary of state and support pro-choice Democratic women running across the country.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c635e/24c69fd9/818f2877/189c4a8b/2616097604/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171023_email_SecretariesofState?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+these+four+women+&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact&source=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c635e/24c69fd9/818f2877/189c4a84/2616097604/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171023_email_SecretariesofState?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact&source=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact")
Electing pro-choice Democratic women to state legislatures, governors' seats, Congress, and the White House are all essential -- but secretaries of state can affect your right to _even vote_ in those elections in the first place.

Republicans have used this powerful office to attack voting rights for years by making it harder for low-income Americans, the elderly, young people, and people of color to vote by purging voter rolls, closing voting locations, and other tricks.

We need Kathleen, Nellie, Jena, and Maggie in office fighting to protect our voting rights from ruthless Republican attacks and making sure elections are free and fair. And you can count on us to endorse even more women running for this critical office in the months to come.

Because these races don't get the most attention, a little money from us can go a LONG way to help them win.

**Donate $3 to help elect our four newly endorsed secretary of state candidates and women running for state and local office across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Secretaries-of-State](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c635e/24c69fd9/818f2877/189c4a85/2616097604/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171023_email_SecretariesofState?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectSecretaries&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact&source=WQEFEJ44N_digital_email_20171023_SoSEndosRollout_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

**[Help Chris support Senate Democrats now>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bae/70cdc2ba/46a9af21/397d791/3191013204/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-alspecial?refcode=em102317&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Help+Chris+support+Senate+Democrats+now+&utm_campaign=em102317&source=em102317")**

Now, a new poll shows Jones and Moore are neck-and-neck. Democrats have a growing opportunity to defeat the alt-right's candidate, flip this seat, and help win back control of the Senate. But that will take a lot more work and a lot more support, and we have only 7 weeks left until the election.

[**Chris is working hard to support Doug Jones and Senate Democrats as we fight to win back the majority. [**Help Chris make sure Doug Jones and Senate Democrats have the resources they need to fight and win >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bae/70cdc2ba/46a9af21/397d7af/3191013204/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-alspecial?refcode=em102317&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Help+Chris+make+sure+Doug+Jones+and+Sena&utm_campaign=em102317&source=em102317")

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Abortion bans. Forcing doctors to lie to women. Criminal charges.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6356/24c69fd9/800d267a/189c7f34/3726819907/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact&source=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact")
---

Peter,

Republican state lawmakers are locked in a race to the bottom to see who can pass the most horrifying anti-choice legislation.

In Virginia, they introduced an abortion ban -- with no exceptions for rape or incest. That is _unacceptable_ , so we endorsed 16 women running there.

In Washington State, every single state Senate Republican has an egregious anti-choice voting record. That is _bad news_ , so we endorsed five women running there.

We put both of these chambers "On Notice" for their anti-choice attacks. Now we need to support all of these women -- because their Election Day is in just a couple of weeks.

**[Donate $3 to help our women in Virginia and Washington State as well as other pro-choice champions across the country replace anti-choice Republicans in state legislatures.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6356/24c69fd9/800d267a/189c7f35/3726819907/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171020_email_StateLegislaturesOnNotice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+our+women+in+Virginia+a&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact&source=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact")**

Republicans' unprecedented wave of anti-choice attacks on abortion care and birth control isn't slowing down.

In the Ohio Senate, they want to force women to choose cremation or burial after an abortion -- or face criminal charges. The Colorado Senate GOP wants to force physicians to lie to their patients about so-called "abortion reversal."

This horrible and unending onslaught on choice is why we're not just targeting individual state lawmakers anymore: We're targeting entire state houses and state senates to flip from red to blue.

**Donate $3 to help elect the next generation of pro-choice champions at the state level and boot anti-choice Republicans from office:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Take-Back-State-Legislatures](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6356/24c69fd9/800d267a/189c7f36/3726819907/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171020_email_StateLegislaturesOnNotice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTakeBackStateLeg&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact&source=WQEFEJ41N_digital_email_20171023_StateLegs_inact")**

Thank you,

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
